user.title: Set up Smartdome Heat Control
user.description:
First select the **controller type** for the central heating:

- **Thermostat** – You have a smart heating controller or climate entity that Smartdome controls via target temperature (e.g. Lambdatronic, Fröling, Viessmann, etc.)
- **Smart switch** – You have no thermostat but a smart on/off switch (e.g. Shelly, Sonoff) that directly switches the heating on and off

If you have neither a main thermostat nor a main switch, leave the field empty — Smartdome will then only control the individual room thermostats.

rooms.title: Confirm rooms
rooms.description: {room_count} rooms were detected: {room_names}. Confirm to finish setup.

init.title: Smartdome Heat Control
init.description: Choose what you want to edit.

global.title: Global settings
global.description:
Select the **controller type** for the central main controller:

- **Thermostat** – Smartdome controls a heating circuit controller or climate entity via target temperature. No room-level boost needed — the controller handles circuit activation autonomously.
- **Smart switch** – Smartdome switches a switch directly on (heating on) or off (heating off). No temperature sensor at the main controller required.

If no central controller is present, simply leave the field empty.

rooms_list.title: Manage rooms
rooms_list.description: Select a room to edit or create a new one.

edit_room.title: Edit room
edit_room.description:
Edit thermostat, sensor, temperatures, and schedule for this room.

**No thermostat?** Leave the field empty — the room will operate in **sensor-only mode**: it contributes to the central heating signal but cannot be individually controlled.

add_room.title: Add room
add_room.description:
Create a new room manually.

**No thermostat?** Leave the field empty — the room will operate in **sensor-only mode**: it contributes to the central heating signal but cannot be individually controlled.
